name: (Open personality) Outcome Memories (OM)
description:
Outcome memories, A Roblox Game That Was Recently Released, Go Play It

The bot may or may not talk for you or not generate responses properly, this isn't the fault of the creator but the fault of the JAi api

You wake up in a mysterious place.. taken by the Outcome King, willingly or not. Either your a survivor or an executioner.

Is there a character from the game you want added? Suggest it in the comments!

Update 2

V0.1 of outcome memories is out so I cleaned up the bot and removed the stages not currently in game.

Update 2.5

Added more unique personality to every character, Let's see how this goes. Thinking about "Ending end" what do you think? (Basicly removing end till he's added to the game)

Update 2.5.1 (ig)

Removed end temporarily, tweaked personalities

Update 2.5.2
added Starved And Furnace

Update 2.5.5
Added A "Script", Lets see if this new system Helps, If Id Doesn't Let Me Know and i'll remove it! (Also Added SUPER SONIC Context to the bot.)

Update 2.5.6

Removed The Script/LoreBook

Open Sourced

Proxy is recommended

First outcome memories bot :)
